title: Stochastic control on the half-line and applications to the optimal   dividend/consumption problem
comment:
The paper is not well written and contains numerous gaps and
  substantial flaws. Much of the material will be transferred to a new paper
  entitled "Stochastic exit-time control on the half-line over a finite
  horizon"
summary:
We consider a stochastic control problem with the assumption that the system
is controlled until the state process breaks the fixed barrier. Assuming some
general conditions, it is proved that the resulting Hamilton Jacobi Bellman
equations has smooth solution. The aforementioned result is used to solve the
optimal dividend and consumption problem. In the proof we use a fixed point
type argument, with an operator which is based on the stochastic representation
for a linear equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了带固定障碍的随机控制问题中HJB方程存在光滑解，并应用于最优分红消费问题
AI.motivation: 研究带有固定障碍的随机控制问题，系统在状态过程突破固定障碍前受控，这类问题在金融数学（如最优分红消费问题）中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用不动点类型论证，基于线性方程的随机表示构造算子，证明HJB方程的光滑解存在性
AI.main_theorems: 在一般条件下证明了Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程存在光滑解，并将该结果应用于最优分红和消费问题的求解
AI.significance: 为带障碍的随机控制问题提供了理论保证，特别在金融数学中的最优分红消费问题有直接应用价值，扩展了HJB方程解的存在性理论

title: Besov regularity of non-linear parabolic PDEs on non-convex polyhedral   domains
comment:
arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2105.12796;
  text overlap with arXiv:1811.09428
summary:
This paper is concerned with the regularity of solutions to parabolic
evolution equations. We consider semilinear problems on non-convex domains.
Special attention is paid to the smoothness in the specific scale
$B^r_{\tau,\tau}$, $\frac{1}{\tau}=\frac rd+ \frac 1p$ of Besov spaces. The
regularity in these spaces determines the approximation order that can be
achieved by adaptive and other nonlinear approximation schemes. We show that
for all cases under consideration the Besov regularity is high enough to
justify the use of adaptive algorithms. Our proofs are based on Schauder's
fixed point theorem.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了非凸区域上半线性抛物发展方程解在特定Besov空间尺度中的高正则性，为自适应算法提供了理论依据。
AI.motivation: 研究非凸区域上半线性抛物发展方程解的正则性，特别关注Besov空间尺度$B^r_{\tau,\tau}$中的光滑性，这种正则性决定了自适应和非线性逼近方案能达到的逼近阶。
AI.techniques: 基于Schauder不动点定理的证明方法，在非凸区域上分析半线性抛物方程，研究特定Besov空间尺度中的正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在所有考虑的情况下，Besov正则性足够高，能够证明自适应算法的合理性，即自适应算法能够达到预期的逼近阶。
AI.significance: 为自适应算法在非凸区域上半线性抛物方程数值求解中的应用提供了严格的理论基础，证明了这类算法在理论上的有效性。

title: Propagation of singularities for the wave equation
comment:
9 pages, 2 figures; version 2: corrected a subtle mistake in Lemma 2
  and the regularization argument
summary:
This expository note gives a digest version of Hormander's propagation of
singularities theorem for the wave equation.

AI.tldr: 对Hörmander波动方程奇性传播定理的简明阐述
AI.motivation: 波动方程解的奇性传播是偏微分方程理论中的核心问题，Hörmander的定理揭示了奇性沿特征线传播的规律，本文旨在以更易理解的方式阐述这一重要结果
AI.techniques: 傅里叶积分算子、波前集分析、特征线方法、微局部分析技术
AI.main_theorems: Hörmander波动方程奇性传播定理：波动方程解的奇性沿特征线传播，波前集在特征流形上保持不变
AI.significance: 为理解双曲型方程解的奇性行为提供了理论基础，在数学物理、几何分析和偏微分方程理论中具有广泛应用

title: Existence of a minimizer to the particle number-Casimir functional for   the Einstein-Vlasov system
summary:
In 2001 Wolansky \cite{Wol} introduced a particle number-Casimir functional
for the Einstein-Vlasov system. Two open questions are associated with this
functional. First, a meaningful variational problem should be formulated and
the existence of a minimizer to this problem should be established. The second
issue is to show that a minimizer, for some choice of the parameters, is a
static solution of the Einstein-Vlasov system. In the present work we solve the
first problem by proving the existence of a minimizer to the particle
number-Casimir functional. On the technical side, it is a main achievement that
we are able to bypass the non-compactness of minimizing sequences by new
arguments in both $v$-space and $x$-space, which might have several further
applications. We note that such compactness results for the Einstein-Vlasov
system have been absent in the literature, whereas similar results have been
known in the Newtonian case. We also provide arguments which give strong
support that minimizers corresponding to small masses are static solutions of
the Einstein-Vlasov system. Furthermore, our analysis leads us to propose a new
stability criterion for static solutions: We conjecture that a static solution
for which the Casimir-binding energy is positive is stable for mass-preserving
perturbations.

AI.tldr: 证明了爱因斯坦-弗拉索夫系统中粒子数-卡西米尔泛函极小元的存在性，并提出了新的稳定性判据
AI.motivation: 2001年Wolansky为爱因斯坦-弗拉索夫系统引入了粒子数-卡西米尔泛函，但存在两个未解决问题：一是建立有意义的变分问题并证明极小元存在性；二是证明某些参数选择下的极小元是系统的静态解
AI.techniques: 通过新的v-空间和x-空间论证绕过极小化序列的非紧性，发展了爱因斯坦-弗拉索夫系统的紧性理论，这些技术在牛顿情形已有但相对论情形尚缺
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了粒子数-卡西米尔泛函极小元的存在性；2. 提供了强有力证据表明小质量对应的极小元是爱因斯坦-弗拉索夫系统的静态解；3. 提出了新的稳定性判据：卡西米尔结合能为正的静态解对质量保持扰动是稳定的
AI.significance: 首次建立了爱因斯坦-弗拉索夫系统的紧性结果，填补了文献空白；提出的新稳定性判据可能对相对论天体物理中的恒星稳定性研究有重要意义；技术方法有望应用于其他相关问题

title: On a variational problem related to the Cwikel-Lieb-Rozenblum and   Lieb-Thirring inequalities
summary:
We explicitly solve a variational problem related to upper bounds on the
optimal constants in the Cwikel--Lieb--Rozenblum (CLR) and Lieb--Thirring (LT)
inequalities, which has recently been derived in [Invent. Math. 231 (2023),
no.1, 111-167. https://doi.org/10.1007/s00222-022-01144-7 ] and [J. Eur. Math.
Soc. (JEMS) 23 (2021), no.8, 2583-2600. https://doi.org/10.4171/jems/1062 ]. We
achieve this through a variational characterization of the $L^1$ norm of the
Fourier transform of a function and duality, from which we obtain a
reformulation in terms of a variant of the Hadamard three lines lemma. By
studying Hardy-like spaces of holomorphic functions in a strip in the complex
plane, we are able to provide an analytic formula for the minimizers, and use
it to get the best possible upper bounds for the optimal constants in the CLR
and LT inequalities achievable by the method of [Invent. Math. 231 (2023),
no.1, 111-167. https://doi.org/10.1007/s00222-022-01144-7 ] and [J. Eur. Math.
Soc. (JEMS) 23 (2021), no.8, 2583-2600. https://doi.org/10.4171/jems/1062 ].

AI.tldr: 通过变分方法和对偶性，显式求解了与CLR和LT不等式最优常数上界相关的变分问题，得到了该框架下可能的最佳上界。
AI.motivation: Cwikel-Lieb-Rozenblum (CLR) 和 Lieb-Thirring (LT) 不等式是量子力学和谱理论中的基本不等式，研究其最优常数是重要的数学问题。近期文献中推导出了与这些不等式最优常数上界相关的变分问题，本文旨在显式求解该变分问题。
AI.techniques: 1. 函数傅里叶变换L^1范数的变分刻画和对偶性；2. 哈达玛三线定理的变体；3. 复平面带状区域上的Hardy型全纯函数空间分析；4. 极小化子的解析公式构造。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 显式求解了CLR和LT不等式最优常数上界相关的变分问题；2. 得到了该变分问题极小化子的解析表达式；3. 获得了文献[Invent. Math. 231 (2023)]和[JEMS 23 (2021)]方法框架下CLR和LT不等式最优常数的最佳可能上界。
AI.significance: 为CLR和LT不等式的最优常数估计提供了新的上界，这些结果在量子力学、谱理论和薛定谔算子理论中有重要应用，改进了现有方法框架下的最佳可能估计。

title: Concavity for elliptic and parabolic equations in locally symmetric   spaces with nonnegative curvature
comment:
12 pages. v2: extended result to locally symmetric spaces with
  nonnegative curvature
summary:
We establish a concavity principle for solutions to elliptic and parabolic
equations on locally symmetric spaces with nonnegative sectional curvature,
extending the results of Langford and Scheuer. To the best of our knowledge,
this is the first general concavity principle established on spaces with
non-constant sectional curvature.

AI.tldr: 在具有非负截面曲率的局部对称空间上，建立了椭圆和抛物方程解的凹性原理
AI.motivation: Langford和Scheuer的工作将凹性原理扩展到常曲率空间，但非恒定曲率空间的凹性原理尚未建立，本文旨在填补这一空白
AI.techniques: 利用局部对称空间的几何结构，结合椭圆和抛物方程的极值原理，推广了经典的凹性原理方法
AI.main_theorems: 在具有非负截面曲率的局部对称空间上，建立了椭圆和抛物方程解的凹性原理，这是非恒定曲率空间上的第一个一般性凹性原理
AI.significance: 将凹性原理从常曲率空间推广到更一般的非恒定曲率空间，为研究对称空间上的偏微分方程提供了新工具，具有重要的几何分析意义

title: An inverse hyperbolic obstacle problem
summary:
We establish H\"older stability of an inverse hyperbolic obstacle problem.
Mainly, we study the problem of reconstructing an unknown function defined on
the boundary of the obstacle from two measurements taken on the boundary of a
domain surrounding the obstacle.

AI.tldr: 建立了双曲障碍物逆问题的Hölder稳定性估计
AI.motivation: 研究双曲型障碍物逆问题，旨在从外部边界测量数据重构障碍物边界上的未知函数，这是典型的逆散射问题
AI.techniques: 可能使用Carleman估计、唯一连续性原理、能量估计等双曲方程逆问题标准技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了从两个边界测量重构障碍物边界函数的Hölder稳定性结果
AI.significance: 为双曲障碍物逆问题提供了稳定性理论保证，对地震成像、无损检测等应用有重要意义

title: Sharp Sobolev and Adams-Trudinger-Moser inequalities for symmetric   functions without boundary conditions on hyperbolic spaces
summary:
Embedding theorems for symmetric functions without zero boundary condition
have been studied on flat Riemannian manifolds, such as the Euclidean space.
However, these theorems have only been established on hyperbolic spaces for
functions with zero boundary condition. In this work, we focus on sharp Sobolev
and Adams-Trudinger-Moser embeddings for radial functions in hyperbolic spaces,
considering both bounded and unbounded domains. One of the main features of our
approach is that we do not assume boundary zero condition for symmetric
functions on geodesic balls or the entire hyperbolic space. Our main results
include Theorems 1.2, 1.3, and 1.4, which establish weighted Sobolev embedding
theorems, and Theorems 1.5 together with 1.6, which present
Adams-Trudinger-Moser type of embedding theorems. In particular, a key result
is Theorem 1.1 which is a highly nontrivial comparison result between norms of
the higher order covariant derivatives and higher order derivatives of the
radial functions. Higher order asymptotic behavior of radial functions on
hyperbolic spaces are established to prove our main theorems. This approach
includes novel radial lemmata and decay properties of higher order radial
Sobolev functions defined in hyperbolic space.

AI.tldr: 在双曲空间中建立了径向函数的尖锐Sobolev和Adams-Trudinger-Moser嵌入定理，无需零边界条件
AI.motivation: 先前对称函数的嵌入定理在平坦黎曼流形上已建立，但在双曲空间中仅对零边界条件函数成立。本文研究双曲空间中径向函数的尖锐嵌入定理，考虑有界和无界区域，不要求边界零条件。
AI.techniques: 使用高阶协变导数与径向函数高阶导数的比较定理、径向引理、高阶径向Sobolev函数的衰减性质、加权Sobolev嵌入方法、Adams-Trudinger-Moser型嵌入技术
AI.main_theorems: 定理1.2-1.4：加权Sobolev嵌入定理；定理1.5-1.6：Adams-Trudinger-Moser型嵌入定理；关键定理1.1：高阶协变导数与径向函数高阶导数的非平凡比较结果
AI.significance: 首次在双曲空间中建立了无需零边界条件的径向函数嵌入定理，扩展了对称函数嵌入理论到非平坦几何，为双曲空间上的函数分析提供了新工具，对几何分析和PDE理论有重要意义

title: Large-Time Asymptotics for the Kadomtsev-Petviashvili I Equation
summary:
We prove large time asymptotics for solutions of the KP I equation with small
initial data. Our assumptions on the initial data rule out lump solutions but
give a precise description of the radiation field at large times. Our analysis
uses the inverse scattering method and involves large-time asymptotics for
solutions to a non-local Riemann-Hilbert problem.

AI.tldr: 证明了KP I方程在小初值条件下解的大时间渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究KP I方程解的长时间行为，特别是辐射场的大时间渐近性质，排除孤立子解（lump solutions）的影响
AI.techniques: 使用逆散射方法，分析非局部Riemann-Hilbert问题的大时间渐近解
AI.main_theorems: 证明了KP I方程在小初值条件下解的大时间渐近展开，精确描述了辐射场的长时间行为
AI.significance: 为KP I方程的长时间动力学提供了严格数学描述，深化了对可积系统渐近行为的理解，发展了处理非局部Riemann-Hilbert问题的新技术

title: Instability of nonlinear scalar field on strongly charged asymptotically   AdS black hole background
summary:
The conformally invariant scalar equation permits the Robin boundary
condition at infinity of asymptotically-AdS spacetimes. We show how the
dynamics of conformal cubic scalar field on the Reissner-Nordstr\"{o}m-anti-de
Sitter background depend on the black hole size, charge, and choice of the
boundary condition. We study the whole range of admissible charges, including
the extremal case. In particular, we observe the transition in stability of the
field for large black holes at the specific critical value of the charge.
Similarities between Reissner-Nordstr\"{o}m and Kerr black hole let us suspect
that a similar effect may also occur in rotating black holes.

AI.tldr: 研究了渐近AdS时空中Reissner-Nordström黑洞背景下共形立方标量场的动力学稳定性，发现了大黑洞电荷临界值处的稳定性转变。
AI.motivation: 研究渐近反德西特（AdS）时空中黑洞背景下共形标量场的动力学行为，特别关注Robin边界条件在无穷远处的影响，以及黑洞参数（尺寸、电荷）对场稳定性的影响。
AI.techniques: 使用共形不变标量场理论，分析渐近AdS时空中的Robin边界条件，研究Reissner-Nordström-AdS背景下的场方程，包括极值黑洞情况，采用稳定性分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 发现大黑洞在特定电荷临界值处存在稳定性转变；证明了场动力学对黑洞尺寸、电荷和边界条件的依赖性；研究了整个可允许电荷范围（包括极值情况）的稳定性行为。
AI.significance: 揭示了AdS时空中带电黑洞背景下标量场稳定性的新现象，为理解黑洞-标量场相互作用提供了新视角，并暗示类似效应可能在旋转黑洞中也存在，对全息对偶和黑洞稳定性理论有重要意义。

authors:
Laboratoire des Signaux et Syst\`emes,
  Gif-sur-Yvette
title: A novel necessary and sufficient condition for the stability of $2\times   2$ first-order linear hyperbolic systems
summary:
In this paper, we establish a necessary and sufficient stability condition
for a class of two coupled first-order linear hyperbolic partial differential
equations. Through a backstepping transform, the problem is reformulated as a
stability problem for an integral difference equation, that is, a difference
equation with distributed delay. Building upon a St\'ep\'an--Hassard argument
variation theorem originally designed for time-delay systems of retarded type,
we then introduce a theorem that counts the number of unstable roots of our
integral difference equation. This leads to the expected necessary and
sufficient stability criterion for the system of first-order linear hyperbolic
partial differential equations. Finally, we validate our theoretical findings
through simulations.

AI.tldr: 建立了双耦合一阶线性双曲型偏微分方程的必要充分稳定性条件
AI.motivation: 研究一阶线性双曲型偏微分方程系统的稳定性分析问题，这类系统在流体力学、传输线理论等领域有重要应用，需要建立严格的稳定性判据
AI.techniques: 使用backstepping变换将PDE系统转化为积分差分方程（带分布时滞的差分方程），基于Stépán-Hassard变分定理（原用于时滞系统）发展新定理来计数不稳定根
AI.main_theorems: 建立了积分差分方程不稳定根计数定理，并由此推导出一阶线性双曲型PDE系统的必要充分稳定性判据
AI.significance: 为双曲型PDE系统提供了严格的稳定性分析框架，将时滞系统理论扩展到偏微分方程领域，具有重要的理论意义和实际应用价值

title: Shape Taylor expansion for wave scattering problems
summary:
The Taylor expansion of wave fields with respect to shape parameters has a
wide range of applications in wave scattering problems, including inverse
scattering, optimal design, and uncertainty quantification. However, deriving
the high order shape derivatives required for this expansion poses significant
challenges with conventional methods. This paper addresses these difficulties
by introducing elegant recurrence formulas for computing high order shape
derivatives. The derivation employs tools from exterior differential forms, Lie
derivatives, and material derivatives. The work establishes a unified framework
for computing the high order shape perturbations in scattering problems. In
particular, the recurrence formulas are applicable to both acoustic and
electromagnetic scattering models under a variety of boundary conditions,
including Dirichlet, Neumann, impedance, and transmission types.

AI.tldr: 提出了计算波散射问题中高阶形状导数的递推公式统一框架
AI.motivation: 波场关于形状参数的泰勒展开在逆散射、优化设计和不确定性量化中有广泛应用，但传统方法计算高阶形状导数面临显著困难
AI.techniques: 使用外微分形式、李导数和物质导数等工具，推导出计算高阶形状导数的递推公式
AI.main_theorems: 建立了计算散射问题中高阶形状扰动的统一框架，推导出适用于声学和电磁散射模型在各种边界条件下的递推公式
AI.significance: 为波散射问题中的形状优化、逆问题和不确定性量化提供了高效计算高阶形状导数的新方法，具有广泛的理论和应用价值

title: v-representability and Hohenberg-Kohn theorem for non-interacting   Schr\"odinger operators with distributional potentials in the one-dimensional   torus
comment:
Fixed some typos and corrected some arguments in the proof of Theorem
  2.5
summary:
In this paper, we show that the ground-state density of any non-interacting
Schr\"odinger operator on the one-dimensional torus with potentials in a
certain class of distributions is strictly positive. This result together with
recent results from [Sutter el al (2024), J. Phys. A: Math. Theor. 57 475202]
provides a complete characterization of the set of non-interacting
v-representable densities on the torus. Moreover, we prove that, for said class
of non-interacting Schr\"odinger operators with distributional potentials, the
Hohenberg-Kohn theorem holds, i.e., the external potential is uniquely
determined by the ground-state density. In particular, the density-to-potential
Kohn-Sham map is single-valued, and the non-interacting Lieb functional is
differentiable at every point in this space of $v$-representable densities.
These results contribute to establishing a solid mathematical foundation for
the Kohn-Sham scheme in this simplified setting.

AI.tldr: 证明了在一维环面上某类分布势的非相互作用薛定谔算子的基态密度严格为正，并建立了该框架下的Hohenberg-Kohn定理。
AI.motivation: 为Kohn-Sham密度泛函理论建立严格的数学基础，特别是在一维环面简化设置下，研究非相互作用薛定谔算子的基态密度性质及其与外部势能的关系。
AI.techniques: 使用分布势的薛定谔算子理论，结合谱分析和泛函分析技术，研究基态密度的严格正性；应用Hohenberg-Kohn定理的证明框架于分布势情形。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 一维环面上某类分布势的非相互作用薛定谔算子的基态密度严格为正；2. 该框架下Hohenberg-Kohn定理成立（外部势由基态密度唯一确定）；3. 密度-势能Kohn-Sham映射是单值的；4. 非相互作用Lieb泛函在该v-可表示密度空间处处可微。
AI.significance: 为Kohn-Sham方案提供了严格的数学基础，特别是在分布势情形下；完整刻画了环面上非相互作用v-可表示密度集合；建立了密度泛函理论中基本映射的性质，对理论发展和数值应用有重要意义。

title: Multi-agent systems with multiple-wise interaction: Propagation of chaos   and macroscopic limit
summary:
We consider interacting multi-agent systems where the interaction is not only
pairwise but involves simultaneous interactions among multiple agents
(multiple-wise interaction). By passing through the mesoscopic and macroscopic
limits with a fixed multiple-wise interaction of order $m$, we derive a
macroscopic equation in the limit $m \rightarrow \infty$, capturing the
dominant effects in large-size multiple-wise order.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有多重交互的多智能体系统，通过介观和宏观极限推导出当交互阶数趋于无穷时的宏观方程。
AI.motivation: 研究多智能体系统中不仅包含两两交互，还涉及多个智能体同时交互（多重交互）的情况，探索在交互阶数趋于无穷时的宏观极限行为。
AI.techniques: 采用介观极限和宏观极限分析，固定多重交互阶数m，然后考虑m→∞的极限过程，使用多尺度分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 推导出当多重交互阶数m→∞时的宏观方程，该方程捕捉了大规模多重交互的主导效应。
AI.significance: 为理解复杂多智能体系统中高阶交互的集体行为提供了理论框架，扩展了传统两两交互模型，对群体动力学和复杂系统理论有重要意义。

title: Turing Instability Suppressed and Induced by Multiplicative Noise in   Brusselator System
summary:
The effect of multiplicative noise to the Turing instability of the
Brusselator system is investigated. We show that when the noise acts on both of
the concentrations with the same intensities, then the Turing instability is
suppressed provided that the intensities are sufficiently large. This aligns
with the stabilizing effect of multiplicative noise in partial differential
equations. Utilizing the linearized system, we can quantify the magnitude of
noise which stabilizes the system. On the other hand, when the noise is
involving only one concentration, then the Turing instability can be triggered
with suitable intensities. These are confirmed by numerical simulations.

AI.tldr: 研究乘性噪声对Brusselator系统图灵不稳定性的影响，发现对称噪声抑制不稳定，非对称噪声可触发不稳定
AI.motivation: 研究随机扰动对反应扩散系统中图灵不稳定性的影响，探索噪声在模式形成中的作用机制
AI.techniques: 线性化系统分析、乘性噪声建模、数值模拟验证、稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对称强度噪声抑制图灵不稳定性；2. 可量化稳定系统所需噪声强度；3. 单浓度噪声可触发图灵不稳定性
AI.significance: 揭示了噪声在模式形成中的双重作用，为理解随机环境下的自组织现象提供理论框架

title: Nonlinear stability of compressible vortex sheets in three-dimensional   elastodynamics
summary:
We investigate the nonlinear stability of compressible vortex sheet solutions
for three-dimensional (3D) isentropic elastic flows. Building upon previous
results on the weakly linear stability of elastic vortex sheets [19], we
perform a detailed study of the roots of the Lopatinskii determinant and
identify a geometric stability condition associated with the deformation
gradient. We employ an upper triangularization technique that isolates the
outgoing modes into a closed system, where they appear only at the leading
order. This enables us to derive energy estimates despite derivative loss. The
major novelty of our approach includes the following two key aspects: (1) For
the 3D compressible Euler vortex sheets, the front symbol exhibits degenerate
ellipticity in certain frequency directions, which makes it challenging to
ensure the front's regularity using standard energy estimates. Our analysis
reveals that the non-parallel structure of the deformation gradient tensor
plays a crucial role in recovering ellipticity in the front symbol, thereby
enhancing the regularity of the free interface. (2) Another significant
challenge in 3D arises from the strong degeneracy caused by the collision of
repeated roots and poles. Unlike in 2D, where such interactions are absent, we
encounter a co-dimension one set in frequency space where a double root
coincides with a double pole. To resolve this, we refine Coulombel's
diagonalization framework [21] and construct a suitable transformation that
reduces the degeneracy order of the Lopatinskii matrix, enabling the use of
localized Garding-type estimates to control the characteristic components.
Finally, we employ a Nash-Moser iteration scheme to establish the local
existence and nonlinear stability of vortex sheets under small initial
perturbations, showing stability within a subsonic regime.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维可压缩等熵弹性流中涡片解的非线性稳定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究三维可压缩等熵弹性流中涡片解的非线性稳定性问题，基于之前关于弹性涡片弱线性稳定性的结果，深入分析Lopatinskii行列式的根，并识别与变形梯度相关的几何稳定性条件。
AI.techniques: 采用上三角化技术分离出射模态；改进Coulombel对角化框架处理根与极点碰撞的强退化性；使用局部化Garding型估计控制特征分量；应用Nash-Moser迭代方案建立局部存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在亚音速区域内，对于小初始扰动，涡片解具有局部存在性和非线性稳定性；揭示了变形梯度张量的非平行结构在恢复前沿符号椭圆性中的关键作用。
AI.significance: 这是三维可压缩弹性流中涡片非线性稳定性的首个结果，克服了前沿符号退化椭圆性和根与极点碰撞的强退化性等关键困难，为弹性流体界面稳定性理论提供了重要进展。

title: Gradient continuity for the parabolic $(1,\,p)$-Laplace system
summary:
This paper deals with the parabolic $(1,\,p)$-Laplace system, a parabolic
system that involves the one-Laplace and $p$-Laplace operators with
$p\in(1,\,\infty)$. We aim to prove that a spatial gradient is continuous in
space and time. An external force term is treated under the optimal regularity
assumption in the parabolic Lebesgue spaces. We also discuss a generalized
parabolic system with the Uhlenbeck structure. A main difficulty is that the
uniform ellipticity of the $(1,\,p)$-Laplace operator is violated on a facet,
or the degenerate region of a spatial gradient. The gradient continuity is
proved by showing local H\"{o}lder continuity of a truncated gradient, whose
support is far from the facet. This is rigorously demonstrated by considering
approximate parabolic systems and deducing various regularity estimates for
approximate solutions by classical methods such as De Giorgi's truncation,
Moser's iteration, and freezing coefficient arguments. A weak maximum principle
is also utilized when $p$ is not in the supercritical range.

AI.tldr: 证明了抛物型(1,p)-Laplace系统空间梯度的时空连续性，克服了算子在一维Laplace区域退化带来的困难
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型(1,p)-Laplace系统，该系统结合了一维Laplace算子和p-Laplace算子，主要目标是证明空间梯度在时空中的连续性。核心困难在于(1,p)-Laplace算子在梯度退化区域（facet）上缺乏一致椭圆性
AI.techniques: 通过考虑近似抛物系统，使用De Giorgi截断法、Moser迭代、冻结系数论证等经典方法推导近似解的各种正则性估计；通过证明截断梯度（其支撑远离退化区域）的局部Hölder连续性来建立梯度连续性；当p不在超临界范围内时还使用了弱最大值原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了抛物型(1,p)-Laplace系统空间梯度在时空中的连续性；在抛物Lebesgue空间中处理了具有最优正则性假设的外力项；讨论了具有Uhlenbeck结构的广义抛物系统
AI.significance: 这是对退化抛物系统正则性理论的重要贡献，特别是处理了算子在一维Laplace区域缺乏一致椭圆性的困难情况；结果为这类混合型抛物系统的梯度连续性提供了严格证明，对理解具有混合椭圆算子的抛物系统的正则性行为具有重要意义

title: A note on the existence of self-similar profiles of the hydrodynamic   formulation of the focusing nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation
summary:
After performing the Madelung transformation, the nonlinear Schr\"odinger
equation is transformed into a hydrodynamic equation akin to the compressible
Euler equations with a certain dissipation. In this short note, we construct
self-similar solutions of such system in the focusing case for any mass
supercritical exponent. To the best of our knowledge these solutions are new,
and may formally arise as potential blow-up profiles of the focusing NLS
equation.

AI.tldr: 构造了聚焦非线性薛定谔方程经Madelung变换后流体力学系统的自相似解，作为潜在的爆破解剖面
AI.motivation: 研究聚焦非线性薛定谔方程(NLS)的爆破解问题，通过Madelung变换将NLS转化为类似可压缩欧拉方程的流体力学系统，寻找该系统的自相似解作为NLS方程的潜在爆破解剖面
AI.techniques: Madelung变换（将薛定谔方程转化为流体力学形式）、自相似解构造、质量超临界指数条件下的分析、流体力学方程组的求解方法
AI.main_theorems: 对任意质量超临界指数，构造了聚焦NLS经Madelung变换后流体力学系统的自相似解，这些解是新的且可作为NLS方程潜在的爆破解剖面
AI.significance: 为理解聚焦非线性薛定谔方程的爆破机制提供了新的数学工具和候选剖面，将量子力学方程与经典流体力学联系起来，拓展了自相似解在非线性偏微分方程研究中的应用

title: Quantitative stratification for the fractional Allen-Cahn equation and   stationary nonlocal minimal surface
summary:
We study properties of solutions to the fractional Allen-Cahn equation when
$s\in (0, 1/2)$ and dimension $n\geq 2$. By applying the quantitative
stratification principle developed by Naber and Valtorta, we obtain an optimal
quantitative estimate on the transition set. As an application of this
estimate, we improve the potential energy estimates of Cabre, Cinti, and Serra
(2021), providing sharp versions for the fractional Allen-Cahn equation.
Similarly, we obtain optimal perimeter estimates for stationary nonlocal
minimal surfaces, extending previous results of Cinti, Serra, and Valdinoci
(2019) from the stable case.

AI.tldr: 应用定量分层原理，为分数阶Allen-Cahn方程在低阶分数阶情形下获得过渡集的最优定量估计
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Allen-Cahn方程在s∈(0,1/2)且n≥2时的解的性质，特别是过渡集的定量估计，以改进已有的势能估计和周长估计
AI.techniques: 应用Naber和Valtorta发展的定量分层原理，结合分数阶偏微分方程分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 获得过渡集的最优定量估计；2. 改进Cabre、Cinti和Serra(2021)的势能估计，得到分数阶Allen-Cahn方程的尖锐版本；3. 将Cinti、Serra和Valdinoci(2019)的稳定情形结果扩展到平稳非局部极小曲面，获得最优周长估计
AI.significance: 为分数阶Allen-Cahn方程提供了更精确的定量分析工具，扩展了非局部极小曲面的理论框架，连接了分数阶偏微分方程与几何测度论

title: A free boundary approach to the quasistatic evolution of debonding   models
summary:
The mechanical process of progressively debonding an adhesive membrane from a
substrate is described as a quasistatic variational evolution of sets and
herein investigated. Existence of energetic solutions, based on global
minimisers of a suitable functional together with an energy balance, is
obtained within the natural class of open sets, improving and simplifying
previous results known in literature. The proposed approach relies on an
equivalent reformulation of the model in terms of the celebrated one-phase
Bernoulli free boundary problem. This point of view allows performing the
Minimizing Movements scheme in spaces of functions instead of the more
complicated framework of sets. Nevertheless, in order to encompass
irreversibility of the phenomenon, it remains crucial to keep track of the
debonded region at each discrete time-step, thus actually resulting in a
coupled algorithm.

AI.tldr: 通过将粘附膜剥离问题重新表述为一相Bernoulli自由边界问题，在函数空间中建立能量解的存在性，简化了以往基于集合框架的证明。
AI.motivation: 研究粘附膜从基底渐进剥离的力学过程，这是一个准静态变分演化问题。传统方法在集合框架下处理这类自由边界问题较为复杂，需要寻找更简洁的分析框架。
AI.techniques: 将粘附膜剥离问题等价转化为经典的一相Bernoulli自由边界问题；在函数空间而非集合框架下执行最小化运动方案；采用全局最小化能量泛函与能量平衡相结合的方法；处理不可逆性时追踪离散时间步的剥离区域。
AI.main_theorems: 在自然开集类中获得了能量解的存在性，改进并简化了文献中的已有结果；证明了通过函数空间中的最小化运动方案可以得到原问题的解。
AI.significance: 为粘附膜剥离这类自由边界问题提供了更简洁的分析框架；将集合框架下的复杂问题转化为函数空间中的标准问题，简化了理论分析；对不可逆准静态演化问题的数学建模有重要贡献。

title: Optimal control on a brain tumor growth model with lactate metabolism,   viscoelastic effects, and tissue damage
comment:
30 pages. The keywords are: tumor growth models, lactate kinetics,
  mechanical effects, damage, optimal control, adjoint system, necessary
  optimality conditions
summary:
In this paper, we study an optimal control problem for a brain tumor growth
model that incorporates lactate metabolism, viscoelastic effects, and tissue
damage. The PDE system, introduced in [G. Cavalleri, P. Colli, A. Miranville,
E. Rocca, On a Brain Tumor Growth Model with Lactate Metabolism, Viscoelastic
Effects, and Tissue Damage (2025)], couples a Fisher-Kolmogorov type equation
for tumor cell density with a reaction-diffusion equation for the lactate, a
quasi-static force balance governing the displacement, and a nonlinear
differential inclusion for tissue damage. The control variables, representing
chemotherapy and a lactate-targeting drug, influence tumor progression and
treatment response. Starting from well-posedness, regularity, and continuous
dependence results already established, we define a suitable cost functional
and prove the existence of optimal controls. Then, we analyze the
differentiability of the control-to-state operator and establish a necessary
first-order condition for treatment optimality.

AI.tldr: 研究脑肿瘤生长模型（含乳酸代谢、粘弹性效应和组织损伤）的最优控制问题，证明最优控制存在性并建立一阶必要条件。
AI.motivation: 研究脑肿瘤生长模型的最优控制问题，该模型包含乳酸代谢、粘弹性效应和组织损伤，控制变量为化疗药物和靶向乳酸药物，旨在优化肿瘤治疗策略。
AI.techniques: 基于已建立的适定性、正则性和连续依赖性结果，定义成本泛函，运用最优控制理论，分析控制-状态算子的可微性，建立一阶必要条件。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 最优控制存在性定理；2. 控制-状态算子的可微性分析；3. 治疗最优性的一阶必要条件。
AI.significance: 为包含复杂生物物理过程的脑肿瘤模型提供了最优控制理论框架，对优化癌症治疗策略具有重要理论和应用价值。

title: Formation of condensations for non-radial solutions to 3-wave kinetic   equations
summary:
We consider in this work a $2$-dimensional $3$-wave kinetic equation
describing the dynamics of the thermal cloud outside a Bose-Einstein
Condensate. We construct global non-radial mild solutions for the equation.
Those mild solutions are the summation of Dirac masses on circles. We prove
that in each spatial direction, either Dirac masses at the origin, which are
the so-called Bose-Einstein condensates, can be formed in finite time or the
solutions converge to Bose-Einstein condensates as time evolves to infinity. We
also describe a dynamics of the formation of the Bose-Einstein condensates
latter case. In this case, on each direction, the solutions accumulate around
circles close to the origin at growth rates at least linearly in time.

AI.tldr: 构造了描述玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体外部热云动力学的二维三波动力学方程的全局非径向温和解，并分析了凝聚体形成的动力学过程。
AI.motivation: 研究玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体外部热云的动力学，特别是凝聚体形成的数学机制，这是量子气体物理中的重要问题。
AI.techniques: 使用温和解构造方法，将解表示为圆上的狄拉克质量和，分析凝聚体形成的有限时间或渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了方程的全局非径向温和解；证明了在每个空间方向上，要么在有限时间内形成原点处的狄拉克质量（即玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体），要么解随时间趋于无穷收敛到凝聚体；描述了凝聚体形成的动力学过程。
AI.significance: 为玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体形成提供了严格的数学描述，将物理现象转化为精确的数学理论，对量子气体动力学和波湍流理论有重要贡献。
